title: Prices Patent Candles Sentinel Nightlight Bag, Pack of 25
features: Burns up to 8hrs per nightlight with a good burn throughout
description: Product Description Price’s pack of 25 high quality white wax nightlights are long burning, giving up to 8 hours of burn time! These are perfect for dinner parties or other occasions when 4 hours just isn’t long enough. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Never burn completely and dispose properly. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 25 Sentinel Nightlights See more
